return(function(...)local B={"\089\107\122\073\089\078\104\061","\074\086\110\098\116\107\089\108\099\078\057\119\090\119\087\120\121\082\067\061","\089\043\057\083\117\107\074\088\117\122\075\106\085\076\100\086","\090\076\100\083\115\054\055\061","\085\049\070\049\051\107\090\098\115\067\074\078\084\086\106\099","\117\107\056\102\117\116\108\105\090\071\055\061";"\117\107\122\103\084\080\061\061";"\111\103\111\043\121\105\080\061","\051\121\087\100\075\122\104\049\099\078\086\069\051\120\073\109\099\068\061\061","\051\051\110\100\077\043\090\074\099\049\090\120\121\122\086\097","\073\065\043\065\115\068\117\113";"\116\121\074\106\104\067\089\114\090\086\057\085\116\082\086\048\121\071\055\061","\052\050\116\099\103\051\056\050\109\076\080\061","\085\120\109\049\065\067\057\098\065\107\100\080\104\043\070\108\051\120\055\061","\121\073\107\072\052\119\085\098";"\085\078\086\119\090\109\061\061";"\104\071\099\085\082\072\061\061";"\075\076\073\112\115\119\070\113\117\107\122\043\065\074\073\104\074\120\104\061";"\049\075\052\061","\113\048\116\104\070\080\061\061","\051\051\086\105\075\121\086\049\109\076\070\100\084\067\056\080\117\071\067\061","\117\043\086\080\090\109\061\061","\120\080\061\061";"\106\085\100\080\080\080\101\103";"\115\074\106\069\065\122\122\067\104\107\074\055\074\082\072\108\116\088\067\061";"\108\088\052\100\068\090\072\061","\077\074\055\080\050\122\067\108\099\120\118\053\104\054\117\120\117\049\085\061";"\089\043\057\083\117\107\074\088\117\067\090\108\115\076\065\119\084\116\056\102";"\071\108\056\078\085\080\061\061";"\109\078\070\114\074\067\121\108\075\071\075\116\074\116\108\108";"\048\101\047\089\119\108\119\056\074\080\061\061","\073\068\061\061";"\051\112\049\111\088\053\075\080\105\097\119\061";"\115\054\104\061","\047\052\103\108\051\080\061\061";"\051\116\075\048\109\086\117\118\077\122\120\049\089\074\106\103\089\074\109\061";"\102\100\078\098\078\108\110\098\077\077\072\069\099\104\070\061","\090\120\122\076\078\087\112\071\109\050\053\107\117\072\061\ return(function(B,f,J,u,j,O,W,o,i,F,e,T,b,g,y,D,Q,l,r,c,V,q,U)Q,D,U,r,T,g,o,q,V,l,y,F,b,i,c,e=function(B,t)local f=q(t)local J=function(J,u,j,O,W,T)return o(B,{J,u,j;O,W,T},t,f)end return J end,function(B,t)local f=q(t)local J=function(J,u,j)return o(B,{J;u,j},t,f)end return J end,{},function(B)local t,o=762779+-762778,B[-671860+(-756741+1428602)]while o do J=function(J,u,j,O,W)return o(B,{J,u,j;O;W},t,f)end return J end,function(o,J,u,j)local N,zs,fs,p,hs,js,X,Ls,z,Gs,ns,os,Z,Ts,U,F,k,A,bs,Bs,Ks,H,ys,C,Ps,r,Rs,Qs,S,P,Os,R,Xs,es,m,Js,Es,a,Y,Vs,qs,G,M,Us,cs,rs,Ws,is,Fs,n,us,I,L,w,vs,gs,Ns,K,Zs,xs,Cs,q,ls,Ds,h,v,x,ts,d,E,s,W while o do if o<((855515+(-135397-(-106423)))+-757273)+7672810 then if o<((-233198-(-641555))+(5124482-(895929+-342498)))-907906 then if o<-23138+(1283982-(-183763))then if o<(911359+13047)+-211571 then if o<1048587-625126 then if o<1307255-968823 then if o<-170870-(-434071)then if o<-599198-(-774446-67993)then W={}U=nil o=B[t(-798763+(1697676-929190))]F=nil q=nil else js=t(((1534056-278557)-455949)+-829706)Vs=4311823022502-(-895592)Us=t((-692827-(273507+-224662))+711402)ts=B[js]Os=T[F]o=5188839-(-1035978)Ws=T[q]Ts=Ws(Us,Vs)js=Os[Ts]os=ts[js]us=os~=k Js=us end else if o<356758+-51885 then F=T[u[781544+-781542]]q=392031+-391906 U=F*q F=8779790317676-930083 W=U+F U=35184372978755-889923 o=W%U T[u[-147228+147230]]=o F=337805+-337804
